body_txt: As might be inferred by the title, a Nixon Mask is a rubber mask with the caricatured features of U.S. President Richard Nixon , specifically a large nose and creepy wide grin. Its status as the best-selling political mask of all time (and in many ways the inspiration for all political masks), as a symbol of famous counterculturists like Hunter S. Thompson and Bob Dylan , and as a hilarious remnant of The '70s have made it a classic go-to prop when a strange/funny mask is needed.
